head.title: Tembo — Coding agents that work where you do

meta.name: description
meta.content: Ship code, review PRs, and fix bugs with autonomous coding agents. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex—from Slack, Linear, GitHub, or anywhere. Just tag @tembo.
Tembo — Coding agents that work where you do
Ship code, review PRs, and fix bugs with autonomous coding agents. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex—from Slack, Linear, GitHub, or anywhere. Just tag @tembo.

meta.name: twitter:description
meta.content: Ship code, review PRs, and fix bugs with autonomous coding agents. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex—from Slack, Linear, GitHub, or anywhere. Just tag @tembo.
